$comment: Your skill bundle manifest. Every source installs from its repo via `npx skills add` — including Argo's own skills, which install from GitHub even inside this monorepo (it dogfoods itself like any consumer). Process: edit skills in packages/argo-skills/skills/, push, then run `npx github:milad-alizadeh/argo` in the target project. `mine` (local ./skills paths) is reserved for pre-push testing only.
